subcodes.title: The Benefits of God to Man: Words spoken on 1911-10-27 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: God alone ordereth all things and is all-powerful. Why then does He send trials to His servants?
subcodes.subjects: @theodicy; the mystery of evil; of suffering, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul, @spiritual transformation, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
